title: Forklift driver -  Logistics  @Tuas /Toh Guan
description:
Forklift Driver (5.5 day/5 days) /Up to $2,000 - $2,200 Basic + OT (Avg 20-45hrs)

  • Receiving and put away including checking, retrieving, loading & unloading, repacking and palletizing.
  • Ensure goods are handled with care and assist in counting of physical inventory.
  • Ensure proper control and maintenance of material handling equipment.
  • Performing of general housekeeping and maintaining of safe working environment.
  • Operating of Forklift /or Reach truck



Interested applicants, send in your updated resume by clicking “Apply Now”.


Lin Weikang
EA Personnel No: R21102570
EA License No: 23C1894

postedCompany.description:
Why Aim Recruit Consultancy?


Introduction: Aim Recruit Consultancy is a dynamic and forward-thinking recruitment firm dedicated to connecting businesses with top talent and helping professionals find their dream careers. With a commitment to excellence and a deep understanding of the job market, we are your trusted partner in the world of recruitment.


Key Highlights:


Mission: Our mission is to bridge the gap between exceptional talent and thriving organizations by delivering personalized recruitment solutions that meet the unique needs of our clients and candidates.


Expertise: Our team of experienced recruiters specializes in a wide range of industries, including IT, healthcare, finance, engineering, marketing, and more. We leverage our industry-specific knowledge to find the best-fit candidates for our clients.


Client-Centric Approach: We understand that every business has distinct requirements. That's why we take the time to understand our clients' culture, values, and goals, enabling us to source candidates who not only possess the right skills but also align with the company's vision.


Talent Network: We have a vast network of highly qualified professionals, giving us access to a diverse pool of candidates. Our rigorous screening and evaluation processes ensure that we only present the most suitable candidates to our clients.


Technology-Driven Solutions: We use cutting-edge technology to streamline the recruitment process, making it more efficient and effective. Our database and applicant tracking system help us match candidates with job opportunities rapidly.


Proven Success: Aim Recruit Consultancy (Previously named Aim Recruit) has successfully placed countless candidates in rewarding positions and assisted numerous companies in building high-performing teams. Our track record speaks to our commitment to delivering results.


Services: 

Executive Search, Permanent/Contract Placement
postedCompany.name: AIM RECRUIT CONSULTANCY PTE. LIMITED
